## Outcome

## Source authority

## Verification

List the focused commands and evidence used to verify the change.

## Device ownership and handoff

- Active device/Codex task:
- Previous owner stopped at commit SHA, when applicable:
- Receiving owner verified that exact SHA, when applicable:

## Boundaries

- [ ] No Prod or publish-mirror files were hand-edited
- [ ] No Cloudflare deployment or remote migration was performed
- [ ] Generated artifacts were regenerated from their upstream owner
- [ ] No other device is writing this branch or semantic scope
